privileged_info_summary: The cps5_small.gdt dataset contains 1,200 real observations from the March 2013 Current Population Survey. The dataset includes the dependent variable 'wage' (earnings per hour) and all required regressors: Model 1 uses 'educ' (years of education, 0-21) and 'exper' (age - educ - 6); Model 2 adds 'metro' (metropolitan area indicator); Model 3 adds 'female' and 'black' (gender and race indicators). The output path is /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/wage_models.tex. Robust standard errors for Model 3 are indicated by keywords like 'Robust' or 'Heteroskedasticity' in the LaTeX output.
